__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Capitoline Wolf,Mysterious Relic,Mysterious Relic,Lucy the Ape,Wilford's Engine
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +20, Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Mutant Gene LVL]]
